overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a dark Victorian-era coat walking through an ornate, wood-paneled indoor hallway with checkered marble floors and classical paintings. The scene features warm artificial lighting from wall sconces and scattered NPCs sitting on benches or standing in groups.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden paneled corridor with checkered marble flooring

events.description: character passes the standing group of NPCs near the wooden door

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor toward a group of NPCs gathered near a door at the end of the hall

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs standing and conversing near a wooden door
NPC sitting on a wooden bench reading or resting

light and dark checkered marble tile pattern covering the floor
warm amber wall-mounted lights illuminating the corridor
large dark wooden door at the end of the corridor section
framed landscape artwork hanging on the left wall
large white ceramic urn on a pedestal against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, wood-paneled corridor with checkered marble flooring and warm wall sconces. A group of three NPCs stands conversing near a door ahead, while another NPC sits on a bench to the left. The atmosphere is quiet and formal, with classical paintings and decorative urns lining the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hallway with classical paintings and seating

events.description: passing a large framed classical painting depicting figures on the right wall

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor past benches with seated NPCs and classical artwork

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting on a green upholstered bench against the right wall

entered.detail: large framed classical painting with multiple figures in ornate frame
classical bust sculpture on a pedestal at the end of the hall
wooden bench with green upholstery against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the continuing corridor, passing benches where NPCs sit quietly. Large classical paintings in ornate frames adorn the walls, and a statue bust becomes visible at the far end. The checkered marble floor and wood paneling remain consistent as the character moves deeper into the hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: wider corridor with red carpet runner

events.description: floor surface changes from checkered marble to red carpet runner
character turns left into a wider section of the corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the hall and turning left into a wider corridor with red carpeting

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting alone on a bench in the wider red-carpeted corridor

entered.detail: long red carpet runner covering the center of the floor
ornate ceiling chandelier hanging in the distance
decorative arched ceiling with detailed moldings

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the marble hallway where the floor transitions to a red carpet runner. Passing a large painting on the right, the character turns left into a wider, more open corridor section featuring chandeliers and arched ceilings. An NPC sits quietly on a bench to the right in this grander space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a formal, wood-paneled interior that transitions from a narrow corridor into a grander, open hall. It begins by following a character through a quiet hallway with checkered marble floors, passing decorative urns and a small group of conversing NPCs under the glow of warm wall sconces. As the character proceeds deeper into the corridor, the camera glides past ornate classical paintings and seated figures before a statue bust comes into view at the far end. The scene then shifts as the marble flooring gives way to a red carpet runner, leading the character past a final large painting. Finally, the camera turns left into a wider section of the building, where the ceiling opens into arches illuminated by chandeliers.
